title: Omnibus D20 System: Geodesic Navigation for Research Provenance

body.text: This paper documents the Omnibus D20 System, a 20-sided geodesic dice (icosahedron) interface for navigating the P31 Labs research corpus. Each face represents one research paper, providing spatial, tactile interaction with complex scientific knowledge.

As research corpora grow beyond traditional linear navigation methods, spatial and geometric interfaces become essential for knowledge discovery. The Omnibus D20 provides a novel interface that maps the first 20 papers to the faces of an icosahedron, with Papers 21-25 accessible via the central core.
Represents mathematical certainty and structural stability
Holographic CSS-3D D20 for high-performance UI rendering
Geodesic Seal interaction for 'Natural 20' sovereignty verification
Integration with P31 Forge document generation engine
The Omnibus D20 serves as both a navigation system and philosophical statement: geometry is destiny, and the icosahedron provides the optimal structure for organizing complex research knowledge.
